music.name: Lights Down Low feat. Yaeji

music.name: Observe: Matrixxman, Risa Taniguchi, Negative Affect, Anastasia
music.why: For heads who want a proper warehouse techno marathon, not a club.
music.summary: A Saturday late-night techno lineup at a TBA warehouse in Los Angeles starting 10pm, a 21+ event stacking deep and driving techno across the night.

music.name: Stacey Pullen, Bae Bae, Nish
music.why: Detroit pedigree for those who want the real techno lineage.
music.summary: A Friday-night tech-house and techno lineup at a TBA Los Angeles venue starting 10pm, a 21+ headliner event led by a Detroit veteran.

music.name: Day Trip Festival
music.why: The weekend's anchor daytime rager if you want sun, water and big names.
music.summary: An outdoor daytime house and techno festival on the Queen Mary waterfront in Long Beach on Saturday from noon, spanning disco-tinged grooves and headline sets across the open-air grounds.

music.name: Into the Horizon: Martin Garrix, Tiesto
music.why: Stadium-EDM nostalgia for the festival crowd willing to drive to San Diego.
music.summary: A Saturday afternoon outdoor festival at Waterfront Park in San Diego built around big-room and pop-EDM headliners, drawing a mainstage crowd to the bayside grounds.

music.name: Baile World Pride ft Bambii, Jubilee, Introspekt
music.why: Global-club bass and Pride energy you won't find anywhere else that night.
music.summary: A Friday-night Pride party at a TBA DTLA venue spanning reggaeton, dembow, gqom, baile funk, Miami bass and Jersey club, starting 10pm for a 21+ crowd.

music.name: Enayet and K Wata
music.why: Hypnotic dub-techno for the late-night headspace, not the dancefloor selfie.
music.summary: A Friday-night techno and dub-techno show at a TBA DTLA venue starting 10pm, a 21+ underground event leaning hypnotic and deep.

music.name: Midnight Lovers, Jkriv
music.why: Free disco-house at a wine bar, the low-effort Friday start.
music.summary: A free Friday-night house, deep-house and disco party at Bar Franca in Los Angeles starting 9pm, a 21+ no-cover bar event.

music.name: Dillon Francis, Flosstradamus
music.why: Throwback moombahton-era rowdiness for a big-room nostalgia night.
music.summary: A Saturday-night trap and dubstep bill at the Hollywood Palladium starting 8pm, mixing hip-hop and EDM crossover energy in an 18+ general-admission room.

music.name: Rare Candy: Daedelus, Salami Rose Joe Louis, Chuck Sutton
music.why: Live-hardware, jazz-tinged weirdness for the adventurous listener.
music.summary: A Saturday-evening experimental, electro and jazz event at De La Playa Records & Leisure in Los Angeles, a 21+ live-hardware showcase.

music.name: Halo Varga, Dylan Payne, Hazy, Pablodiscobar

music.summary: A Friday-night tech-house, minimal and techno lineup at a TBA Arts District venue starting 10pm, a 21+ underground party.

music.name: Discostan
music.why: Global-diaspora disco you genuinely can't hear anywhere else.
music.summary: A Saturday-night disco, world-club and funk party at El Cid in Los Angeles starting 9pm, a 21+ event spinning sounds from across the global diaspora.

music.name: Pride Plastique: MICROPLASTIQUE, J'ADORE, THEYNGEL +

music.summary: A free Saturday-evening Pride party at The Slipper Clutch in Los Angeles spanning techno, pop, hard groove and bass house, a 21+ no-cover event.

music.name: Franky Wah

music.summary: A Saturday-night progressive and melodic house headliner at Community Berlin in Los Angeles starting 10pm, a 21+ club show.

music.name: Float feat. Eric Luttrell

music.summary: A Saturday-evening rooftop session at Level 8 DTLA serving progressive and melodic Anjunadeep-leaning house, a 21+ headliner set above downtown.

music.name: Aaron Hibell

music.summary: A Thursday-night show at the Fonda Theatre in Hollywood blending trance and techno with classical, cinematic textures in an 18+ seated-theatre setting starting 8pm.

music.name: Gabriel & Dresden

music.summary: A Saturday-night melodic dubstep and future-bass show at Academy Nightclub in Hollywood starting 10pm, a 21+ club event.

sports.name: Demo Days Festival (Motorcycle Demo District)
sports.why: Actually ride the bikes, not just gawk at a showroom floor.
sports.summary: An all-day Saturday outdoor moto festival where attendees test-ride motorcycles and e-bikes across the Demo Days Festival grounds in Los Angeles.

sports.name: Demo Days Festival (Motorcycle Demo District)
sports.why: Sunday's quieter day to actually demo bikes before the lines build.
sports.summary: An all-day Sunday outdoor moto festival where attendees test-ride motorcycles and e-bikes across the Demo Days Festival grounds in Los Angeles.

sports.name: Abbot Kinney One (1-mile)
sports.why: A single fast mile, the no-training-required race for everyone.
sports.summary: A Sunday-morning one-mile street race down Abbot Kinney Blvd in Venice, a short, fast all-out road sprint through the neighborhood.

sports.name: Alien Run (5K/10K/10M/Half)
sports.why: Pick your distance up to a half, the flexible long-run option.
sports.summary: A Sunday-morning road race in Long Beach offering 5K, 10K, 10-mile and half-marathon distances across a single themed event.

sports.name: Griffith Park parkrun 5K (free)
sports.why: Free, timed and weekly, the zero-commitment Saturday run.
sports.summary: A free weekly Saturday 8am timed 5K in Griffith Park, part of the global parkrun series open to runners and walkers of all levels.

sports.name: Health is Wealth 5K
sports.why: Easygoing charity 5K for a low-key Sunday by the coast.
sports.summary: A Sunday-morning charity 5K road run in Long Beach, a community-focused fundraiser open to runners and walkers.

sports.name: LA Critical Mass
sports.address: Wilshire Blvd & Western Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90010
sports.why: Free, leaderless street takeover on two wheels, pure LA ritual.
sports.summary: A free Friday group bike ride gathering at Wilshire & Western in Koreatown at 6:30pm with a 7:30pm roll-out, an open community ride through the city streets.

sports.name: Open Skate Session @ Stoner Skate Plaza
sports.why: Free all-day skate, just show up with a board.
sports.summary: A free Saturday open skate session from 10am to 5pm at Stoner Skate Plaza in West LA, an outdoor daytime skatepark gathering.

sports.name: Run for the Rancho - Race 2 (5K trail)
sports.why: Weeknight trail miles in the hills, a break from road races.
sports.summary: A Thursday-evening 5K trail race in Calabasas, the second installment of a summer series run on dirt rather than road.

sports.name: The Moto Social Los Angeles (monthly meetup)
sports.why: Free monthly riders' hang, all about the people not the miles.
sports.summary: A free Thursday-evening monthly motorcycle community meetup in Los Angeles, a casual gathering of riders rather than a ride or race.

sports.name: Union Rescue Mission 5K/10K Run + Walk
sports.why: Run with a cause downtown, the feel-good way to start Saturday.
sports.summary: A Saturday 8am charity 5K and 10K road run and walk through DTLA, benefiting the Union Rescue Mission with both competitive and walking options.
